channel.title: NVDA — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on NVDA (NVIDIA) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: TRIMMED NVDA (-25%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) trimmed NVDA in Q4 2025 · 8.6% of portfolio. Continuing to trim the NVDA home run. Taking profits.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED NVDA (+25%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added NVDA in Q4 2025 · 10.2% of portfolio. Doubling down on AI infrastructure.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Tepper)

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED NVDA (+20%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added NVDA in Q4 2025 · 9.4% of portfolio. AI infrastructure conviction.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED NVDA (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) added NVDA in Q4 2025 · 6.2% of portfolio. Still leaning into AI infrastructure.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED NVDA (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added NVDA in Q4 2025 · 2.6% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED NVDA (-15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed NVDA in Q4 2025 · 4.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Bill Nygren: TRIMMED NVDA (-12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) trimmed NVDA in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Chase Coleman: TRIMMED NVDA (-10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) trimmed NVDA in Q4 2025 · 7.1% of portfolio. Taking some NVDA profits.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chase Coleman)
